agentAbility.name: Lights Out
agentAbility.description: Deploys an EMP bomb via drone. Pulses Slow enemies before the final detonation Jams and damages them.

primaryAttack.name: Autoloader
primaryAttack.description: Allows firing several shots within a short time interval, after that, takes some time to reload empty drum.

tankAbilities.name: Recon Probe
tankAbilities.description: Launches up to 3 probes to detect enemies and mark them as Traced for allies.

tankAbilities.name: MK19 Auto Turret
tankAbilities.description: Automatic turret that fires HE bursts at enemies in view, helping with escape or pressure.
